questions.name: C Functions - Palindrome
questions.questiontext:
Design and implement a user-defined function in C that determines whether a given string is a palindrome. A palindrome is a string that reads the same forward and backward.
Example:

questions.name: C Functions - Armstrong number
questions.questiontext:
Design and implement a user-defined function in C that determines whether a given integer number is an Armstrong number. A natural number is an Armstrong number if it is equal to the sum of its own digits each raised to the power of the number of digits.
Example:
questions.code:
int n = 153;
isArmstrong(n) // Result: true, because 153 = 1^3 + 5^3 + 3^3
